overview: SE Essentials is a premium monochrome boutique marketplace for rare digital art and designer goods. Features a sophisticated black-and-white aesthetic, tiered membership system, secure checkout, and curated product discovery.
features: 2-column product grid with bold pricing, star ratings, and Buy Now buttons
Tiered membership showcase (Standard, Executive, Elite) with upgrade flow
Wishlist with heart toggle on every product card
Secure checkout with Verified Transaction and Encrypted Communication badges
Location-aware header with search and sticky bottom navigation
Order history and detailed order tracking
User profile with Internet Identity login
